title: Girya
description: You can now gain [gold]Strength[/gold] at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold]. ([blue]3[/blue] times max)
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Displays a counter showing times lifted. Each use at a Rest Site grants Strength. Limited to 3 lifts per run. Applies accumulated Strength when entering combat. Not available after Act 3.
